translations.en: Koranada
a dignified man wearing a loose jacket decorated with a serpent.
translations.zh: 一位舉止莊重之男子，身著繡有蛇紋之寬袍。

translations.en: "It is good to see thee again, $P."
"Hello, adventurer
"As guildmaster, I welcome thee in the name of the Order of the Silver Serpent."
translations.zh: 「在下為公會首座，謹以銀蛇騎士團之名歡迎汝。」

translations.en: "What is thy name?"
"Well met, $G Avatar!"
"I am Koranada, son of Kulebra."
translations.zh: 「在下科蘭納達，庫雷布拉之子。」

translations.en: "My father was a brave @lighthouse keeper."
"An earthquake destroyed the lighthouse, else I would have inherited the position of keeper in Greyhaven."
translations.zh: 「地震毀了燈塔，否則我本可承繼灰港之守塔之職。」

translations.en: "I traveled to Serpent's Hold to join the @Order instead."
"We stand for the principle of @Courage."
"We are honored by thy membership, worthy Avatar!"
translations.zh: 「聖者大駕加盟，乃我等之榮幸！」

translations.en: "Acquire a Silver Serpent @shield and thou wilt be admitted to the order, $G $P."
"Dost thou wish to join the Order of the Silver Serpent?"
"Go and speak to de Hugh. Observe what he believes to be courage."
translations.zh: 「可往訪德修，聽其論勇之要義。」

translations.en: "Though he is a fine fighter, he has yet to prove himself worthy of our @order."
translations.zh: 「他雖戰技卓越，然尚未證明自己堪入我@order（團）。」

translations.en: "The Serpent Shield of our order is a sacred symbol of our brotherhood of bravery."
translations.zh: 「我團之蛇盾，乃勇者兄弟會之神聖象徵。」

translations.en: "Carry it with pride!"
"Its making is a magical @process."
"@Gherick the Smithy will help thee make one."
"'Tis secret, as well."
"You will most likely find him at Siege Crafters."
translations.zh: 「汝多半可在『攻城匠坊』尋得其人。」

translations.en: "I have responsibilities here
,$G. But I am honored by the offer."
. However..."
"Dost thou wish to join the Order of the Silver Serpent?"
"Without the meaning, such a symbol is just a meaningless scratching."
translations.zh: 「若不明其意，此符號不過無謂之刻痕。」

translations.en: "We @meditate on valour here."
"A mantra is a concept, a special word to be turned over and over in the mind."
translations.zh: 「真言乃一概念，一特殊之語，於心中反覆推敲。」

translations.en: "When we meditate on a mantra, we do so in order to find the @meaning of that virtue."
translations.zh: 「冥思真言之目的，乃為尋彼德之@meaning（真意）。」

translations.en: "It is not enough just to know a mantra or possess a rune."
"In order to be @virtuous, one must act virtuously."
"Sometimes one virtue conflicts with another, though both be numbered amongst the virtues of the Avatar."
translations.zh: 「諸德之中，二德有時亦相衝，雖皆列於聖者八德之中。」

translations.en: "The hero seeks to act with an awareness of these conflicts instead of merely following instinct."
translations.zh: 「英雄行事，當有此衝突之自覺，而非僅憑本能。」

translations.en: "My teacher @Conor taught me this."
"A dear friend. He was guildmaster here when I was in training."
translations.zh: 「至交也。我修業之時，他正為此處之首座。」

translations.en: "He lives humbly in New Magincia now."
"Fare thee well."
"That I cannot help thee with."
"There will always be a place here for thee, $G."
"We would be greatly honored if thou wouldst join us, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「聖者若願加盟，乃我等莫大之榮。」

translations.en: "Thy deeds speak well of thee, $P."
"I shall waive the usual requirements since thy adventures are more than sufficient proof of thy courage."
translations.zh: 「鑒於汝歷險之績已足證汝之勇，例行條件得免。」

translations.en: "However, thou must still create thine own shield."
translations.zh: 「然汝仍須親手鑄就自己之盾。」

translator_notes: Koranada = 蛇要塞銀蛇騎士團首座，Valor 城核心 NPC，劇情點：解釋八德、mantra/rune 概念、發起 Silver Serpent shield 任務。語氣莊重 thee/thou → 汝。
